NCT03734029.name: DESTINY-Breast04
NCT03734029.group: Trastuzumab Deruxtecan (T-DXd) 5.4 mg/kg IV q3w | ADC (HER2-low MBC IHC 1+ or IHC 2+/ISH-, previously treated; vs Treatment of Physician’s Choice chemo)

allOutcomes.title: BICR PFS T-DXd vs TPC in HER2-low MBC overall population (DESTINY-Breast04 primary; median follow-up 18.4 mo)

NCT03734029.snippet: Modi S et al. NEJM 2022;387:9-20 (DESTINY-Breast04). Practice-changing: first ADC efficacy signal in HER2-low disease (previously considered HER2-negative by IHC/ISH standards).

evidence.label: Eligibility (AACT-derived)
evidence.text: AACT-derived (auto-populated 2026-05-04). Sex: ALL; min age 18 Years; healthy volunteers: f. CRITERIA: "Inclusion Criteria:~* Is the age of majority in their country~* Has pathologically documented breast cancer that:~  1. Is unresectable or metastatic~ 2. Has low-HER2 expression defined as IHC 2+/ISH- or IHC 1+ (ISH- or untested)~ 3. Is HR-positive or HR-negative~ 4. Has progressed on, and would no longer benefit from, endocrine therapy~ 5. NCT04494425.name: DESTINY-Breast06
NCT04494425.group: Trastuzumab Deruxtecan (T-DXd) 5.4 mg/kg IV q3w | ADC (HR+ HER2-low or HER2-ultralow MBC, chemo-naive in MBC; vs Treatment of Physician’s Choice chemo)

allOutcomes.title: BICR PFS T-DXd vs TPC in HER2-low HR+ MBC (DESTINY-Breast06 primary; chemo-naive MBC after progression on endocrine therapy)

NCT04494425.snippet: Bardia A et al. NEJM 2024;391:2110-2122 (DESTINY-Breast06). Extends T-DXd use into earlier line post-endocrine; also includes HER2-ultralow exploratory cohort.

evidence.label: Eligibility (AACT-derived)
evidence.text: AACT-derived (auto-populated 2026-05-04). Sex: ALL; min age 18 Years; max age 105 Years; healthy volunteers: f. CRITERIA: "Key Inclusion Criteria:~* Patients must be ≥18 years of age~* Pathologically documented breast cancer that:~  1. is advanced or metastatic~ 2. has a history of HER2-low or negative expression by local test, defined as IHC 2+/ISH- or IHC 1+ (ISH- or untested) or HER2 IHC 0 (ISH- or untested)~ 3. has HER2-low or HER2 IHC >0 <1+ expression as determined by the central laboratory result established on a tissue sample taken in the metastatic setting~ 4. was never previously HER2-positive~ 5. is do...

NMA_CONFIG.note: k=2 T-DXd vs TPC trials in HER2-low MBC. Single edge (Pairwise). No closed loops. TPC_HER2low composite is declared (DB04 used capecitabine/eribulin/gemcitabine/paclitaxel/nab-paclitaxel; DB06 similar set). TPC in this setting is methodologically different from TPC in the main ADC_HER2_NMA (HER2+ MBC) because the patient population precludes HER2-directed therapy in the comparator arm.

title: RapidMeta Oncology | ADC NMA in HER2-Low Metastatic Breast Cancer v1.0
